name: K9warehouse Knee Cap Bones Dog Chew Treats
description: You’ll be the bee’s knees when you treat your paw-tner to healthy and mouthwatering K9warehouse Knee Cap Bones Dog Chew Treats. Long-lasting and fully digestible, these single-ingredient knee cap bones are ideal for moderate and power chewers. Ideal for training rewards or as a boredom-busting chew, these slow-roasted, naturally smoked morsels won't crumble like biscuits. As a bonus, they help clean your doggo’s teeth as he chews by scraping off tartar and plaque. You can rest easy knowing these preservative-free chews are sourced from free-range, grass-fed beef—your buddy will just enjoy the taste and texture. Chews wisely!
